distilleries.name: Licores Casajus
distilleries.address: Pol. Ind. Villalonquejar, C/ Montes de Oca 5, 09001 Burgos, Spain
distilleries.description: Fourth-generation family distillery tracing roots to Quintana del Pidio in Burgos province, where great-grandfather Jose Casajus established the original alcoholera in 1918. The current Burgos city facility produces over 100 references including pomace orujo, herbal and pacharán liqueurs; the Crema de Burgos is a tribute to the local yemas sweet.
distilleries.visitor_experience: Products available to purchase via their online store and at local retailers including VinosRibera.com; distillery visits by prior arrangement

verified.address_quoted: Pol. Ind. Villalonquejar, c/ Montes de Oca, 5, Burgos - 09001

distilleries.name: Bodegas J.A. Calvo Casajus (Distilled Grape Spirits)
distilleries.address: C/ Cercado 9, 09370 Quintana del Pidio, Burgos, Spain
spirits_produced: Marc de Bourgogne-style grape marc distillate
distilleries.description: DO Ribera del Duero winery in Quintana del Pidio with a separate tradition of distilling grape marc into orujo-style aguardiente from estate Tempranillo pomace. Note: Licores Casajus (the spirits arm) and Bodegas J.A. Calvo Casajus (the wine arm) are related family operations but operationally distinct; both are rooted in the same Quintana del Pidio family history.
distilleries.visitor_experience: Winery visits and Ribera del Duero wine tastings; distilled grape spirits available in the estate shop

distilleries.name: Finca Torremilanos Marc and Grape Distillates
distilleries.address: Nacional 122 Km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
distilleries.description: One of DO Ribera del Duero's founding estates, Finca Torremilanos (Bodegas Penalba Lopez) distils estate Tempranillo pomace into marc-style aguardiente as a traditional by-product of their biodynamic winemaking. The estate hotel and restaurant stock the distillate alongside the main wine range.
distilleries.visitor_experience: Estate hotel and restaurant; winery tours; marc available to purchase with estate wine

verified.address_quoted: Nacional 122, km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos

distilleries.name: Bodegas Felix Callejo Grape Distillates
distilleries.address: Avenida del Cid Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
spirits_produced: Aguardiente de orujo from estate Tempranillo pomace
distilleries.description: Felix Callejo in Sotillo de la Ribera produces a small annual batch of aguardiente de orujo distilled from the marc of their estate Tempranillo grapes. Available exclusively through the cellar-door shop following harvest; positioned as a traditional by-product of the single-vineyard wine program.
distilleries.visitor_experience: Winery visits and tastings available; distillate available in estate shop post-harvest

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Espana

distilleries.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro Estate Marc
distilleries.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
spirits_produced: Marc de Tempranillo orujo from estate pomace
distilleries.description: Bodegas Emilio Moro on the Golden Mile distils a small quantity of Tempranillo pomace marc following each harvest. The clear grape spirit is not widely distributed but is available at the estate shop and served during select premium tasting experiences at the winery.
distilleries.visitor_experience: Available during gastronomic tasting experiences at the estate; cellar-door purchase only

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

_editorial_note: Castilla y Leon is not a major spirits distillation region. This topic is honest-thin: Licores Casajus is the main commercial spirits producer with genuine Ribera del Duero roots; the remaining entries are estate marc/orujo produced as traditional winemaking by-products and are not independent distilleries in the full sense. The Tier-1 floor of 10 cannot be honestly reached without fabrication. Entries 2-5 are real and verifiable but represent grape-marc by-products rather than dedicated distillery operations. No pacharán or brandy distillery with a physical address and visitor access within the DO Ribera del Duero zone was found during research.
